rationale: Hard pass. The archetype's dark, muted palette (navy/olive/orange) and somber cross-section reveal aesthetic clash directly with Crazy Kick's sunny yellow/sky-blue low-poly stickman world, and a static architectural pan has zero connection to a swipe-to-score football loop. Audience overlap is also weak — Eiffel/bunker curiosity hooks index toward 4X, sim, or puzzle-mystery players, not arcade sports fans. Don't adapt this; if curiosity is a desired emotional pitch, build a sports-native version (e.g., "what's hidden behind this impossible defender wall?").
